vision.problem: Partners integrate our metrics by scraping CSV exports; there is no supported programmatic access, so every integration is bespoke and brittle.
vision.success:
A developer integrates via the API in under an hour using the docs alone.
Uptime ≥ 99.9%

claudeMd:
## Tech Stack
- Runtime: Node.js 20 LTS
- Framework: Express.js
- Database: PostgreSQL 15
- ORM: Prisma

## Structure
- /src/routes   - HTTP endpoints
- /src/services - business logic
- /src/db       - data access
- /src/lib      - shared utilities

## Patterns
- Thin routes, logic in services
- All DB access through /src/db
- Validate input at the route boundary

## Constraints
- No business logic in routes
- All external calls have error handling
architectureStyle: Architecture: backend/API service only (headless, no UI).
platforms: No UI — API/service consumed by other clients.
cloud: Deploy to AWS (ECS/Lambda, RDS, S3, CloudFront).
operations: Single API gateway for routing, auth & rate limiting.
Circuit breakers, retries & bulkheads between services.
budgetDirection: Budget: invest in novel/Genesis components — build custom to create the future.
Budget posture: run & operate / opex — ongoing operational budget.
deliveryGovernance: Org: stream-aligned teams own end-to-end flow.
Approach: decisions recorded as ADRs in the repo.
Approach: governance as code — fitness functions enforced in CI.
fitnessFunctions: Fitness function: no critical outdated/vulnerable deps.
testingStrategy: Testing: unit tests for core logic.
Testing: contract tests for API boundaries.
cicd: CI/CD: separate dev, staging & production environments.
performanceScale: Scale: caching (CDN / app / DB) to meet targets.
deliveryContext: Context: greenfield — a brand-new build from scratch.
security: Security: TLS 1.2+ for all traffic; HSTS.
Security: secrets in a vault/secret store — never in code or env files committed.
Security: defend against the OWASP Top 10 (injection, XSS, CSRF, etc.).
Security: validate & sanitise all input at trust boundaries.
Security: scan dependencies for known vulnerabilities (SCA) in CI.
Security: static & dynamic application security testing in CI.
Security: tamper-evident audit log of sensitive actions.
dataPrivacy: Data: defined retention periods & deletion/erasure workflow.
Data: automated backups + tested disaster recovery.
localization: i18n: single locale for now (English) — design strings to be externalisable later.
i18n: store UTC; display in the user timezone.
integrations: Store files in S3-compatible object storage.
apiDelivery: Expose a documented public REST API (OpenAPI).
Provide client SDKs for the API.
